SessionStart.command:
echo '--- Anne IAQ Plugin Loaded ---
I am Anne, your WELL AP consultant and IAQ specialist.

Available commands:
  /inbiot-anne:facility-dashboard          - Facility-wide overview
  /inbiot-anne:air-quality-analysis <dev>  - Air quality analysis
  /inbiot-anne:health-advisory <dev>       - Health recommendations
  /inbiot-anne:well-certification <dev>    - WELL v2 assessment
  /inbiot-anne:compare-devices <d1> <d2>   - Compare two devices
  /inbiot-anne:trend-analysis <dev> ...    - Pattern analysis
  /inbiot-anne:ventilation-check <dev>     - Ventilation assessment
  /inbiot-anne:daily-report [date]         - End-of-day summary

Start with /inbiot-anne:facility-dashboard to see all monitored spaces.'
